title: gymnadenia albida subsp. straminea
intro: Gymnadenia albida subsp. straminea, also known as the white-spurred orchid, is a plant species in the orchid family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Gymnadenia albida subsp. straminea is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form.
